title: FIG. 4 in The Amidella clade in Europe (Basidiomycota: Amanitaceae): clarification of the contentious Amanita valens (E.-J.Gilbert) Bertault and the importance of taxon-specific PCR primers for identification
author: Arraiano-Castilho, Ricardo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: FIG. 4. — Plotting of the measurements summarised in Table 5 (dots), comparing with the limits of the sporographs, based on the descriptions in Neville & Poumarat (2004) for Amanita curtipes f. pseudovalens Neville & Poumarat (continuous line) and A. ponderosa f. ponderosa Malençon & R.Heim (dashed line).
